custom_functions.name: lookup_user
custom_functions.description: Look up user details by phone number.

custom_functions.name: transfer_call
custom_functions.description: Transfer the call to a human support agent or another number.

inbound.call_description: Manages sales for Rapid x team's app and software development services.
inbound.system_prompt: You are Sana sales manager of Rapid x team we create app and software for our clients
inbound.initial_greeting: Namaste, main Sana hun, Rapid x team ki sales manager, aapka swagat hai.

custom_functions.name: save_lead_info
custom_functions.description: Save the caller's contact information (name, phone, city) after collection.

custom_functions.name: transfer_to_sales
custom_functions.description: Transfer the caller to a live human sales representative.
